sol.cleanWin: No undo, no hint — clean win.
sol.adSlot: ad space (reserved, never covers the cards)
sol.fairTitle: Every deal has a solution. And we show our work.
sol.fair1: ① Every deal is checked by a solver before you see it. If it has no solution, you never get it.
sol.fair2: ② But here is the honest part: "solvable" means solvable if you could see the face-down cards. You cannot. So luck still exists.
sol.fair3: ③ We can promise this deal is not a dead end. We cannot promise you will win.
sol.fairGap: How far is "solvable" from "you will win"?
sol.fairTable1: Random deal (what most solitaire apps give you)
sol.fairBlindNote: Our "blind AI" plays with exactly your information — it cannot see face-down cards either. That number is the honest distance between "there is a way" and "you will find it".
sol.proveWinSub: We just found a path to victory from here.
sol.proveDead: This deal is no longer winnable.
sol.proveDeadSub: Not your fault — with the cards you could see, this may have been unavoidable.
sol.proveUnknownSub: We ran out of budget. We don't know, and we won't pretend we do.
sol.fairLost: When you lose, is it really over?
sol.fairLostVal: 45% of the deals you lose are still winnable. You just did not find it.
sol.fairLostSub: That is why undo, hints and restart are free here, forever. Locking them behind an ad would mean charging you to find out you still had a chance.
sol.fairDiffEasy: Difficulty: Easy (even our blind AI wins this one)
sol.fairDiffHard: Difficulty: Hard (solvable, but our blind AI cannot win it)
sol.cleanRate: Win rate with no undo, no hints
sol.cleanNote: This is the number worth bragging about. Unlimited undo makes the plain win rate meaningless, so we track both.
sol.dailySub: Same deal for everyone, every day.
sol.freeForever: Undo, hints and restart are free. Forever.
sol.introTitle: The solitaire you can argue with.
sol.introSub: Stuck? Ask it: "is this deal still winnable?" A real solver runs on your device and answers you.
sol.introB1: It gives one of three answers — still solvable / no longer solvable / "we couldn't work it out". We will not pretend to know something we don't.
sol.introB2: Every Klondike deal is verified solvable before it is dealt. But "solvable" means solvable if you could see the face-down cards — and you can't. So we never claim you are guaranteed to win.
sol.introB3: Undo, hints, restart and the solver are free. Forever. No ad. 45% of the deals you lose are still solvable — charging you to find that out would be indefensible.
